channel.title: English on SunBeau's Blog - A super concise theme for Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in English on SunBeau's Blog - A super concise theme for Hugo

item.title: [English] Creating a New Theme -- 主题模板示例
item.description: Introduction This tutorial will show you how to create a simple theme in Hugo. I assume that you are familiar with HTML, the bash command line, and that you are comfortable using Markdown to format content. I’ll explain how Hugo uses templates and how you can organize your templates to create a theme. I won’t cover using CSS to style your theme. We’ll start with creating a new site with
